word: G33 - ἄγε - áge - ag'-eh - Go to

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἄγε

- Transliteration: Age

- Phonetic: ag'-eh

- Definition:

1. go to, come!, come now!

- Origin: imperative of G71

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: Imperative of G71; properly lead that is come on: - go to.
